title: Add Tickflow repo/run identity and worktree path planner
description: Implement repoSlug/runId generation and deterministic worktree/branch path planning for Tickflow worktree mode. Namespace paths by repo identity and run id so local tick IDs cannot collide across sibling repos or reruns. Include dry-run output for planned worktree paths.
acceptance_criteria: Given a repo, epic, and tick, planner returns ../.tickflow-worktrees/<repo-slug>/<run-id>/<tick-id> and branch tf/<run-id>/<tick-id>; repoSlug includes a stable hash of remote URL or repo root; /tickflow-run --worktrees --dry-run shows planned paths.
